'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 7''' is the seventh issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in [[April]] [[1996]]. This issue's theme focused on ''[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]''.

The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 7, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with Topps Finest Chromium [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and [[1996 Topps Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']] [[Dark Prince|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] promotional trading cards, and issue 12 of the [[LucasArts]] Company Store catalog. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[Casting Shadows]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

===Departments===
*''[[Rebel Report]]''
*''[[Communiqués]]''
*''[[Around the Galaxy]]''
*[[Galactic Bazaar|''The Galactic Bazaar'']]: ''That's Kits, Not Kitsch''; ''Shadows on the Shelves''; ''Where Ewoks Go to Retire''
*''[[ComicScan]]'': ''The Graying of the Galaxy''
*''[[Game Room]]'': ''Dashing From The Shadows''
*''[[Star FX]]'': ''Anatomy of a Thriller''
*''[[Cyber Notes]]''
*''[[Use the Force]]'': [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire|''Shadows of the Empire'']] Trivia Contest

*''[[Boba Fett: Twin Engines of Destruction]]''
